finding: TASK-RFT-0062 declared scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next/**/*.ts in scope, but taskflow pre-close initially excluded the newly created module files from the governed close bundle until tasks scope add listed each file explicitly.
expectedBehavior: Taskflow close and pre-close should expand in-scope glob patterns against newly created files, or surface a direct scope-amendment command before excluding those files from the governed bundle.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-RFT-0062, taskflow pre-close reported excludedDirtyFiles for scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next/*.ts even though the task card scope included scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next/**/*.ts. Running tasks scope add for the nine module files resolved the close bundle.
followUp: Add a taskflow scope glob expansion test covering newly created files under declared glob scope, then either include those files automatically in governed bundles or emit a precise pre-close remediation command.
